calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-19-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Joseph Sacramento, Esq. for Plaintiff: Magne E. Veimoen.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ivory Brown and Byron McKissack sued as Bryon Missick.
9:40 a.m. Plaintiff's witness: Magne L. Veimoen, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
Exhibit 1- Lease agreement dtd. 4-28-03-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice dtd. 7-2-04-----------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 136 6th Street #301, San Francisco.
Damages $3,940.00
Attoeney's Fees of $750.00
Costs $269.78
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits and to prepare Judgment.

July 19, 2004, Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES;JOSEPH ALCORDO SACRAMENTO, ESQ. FOR PLTF MAGNE L. VEIMOEN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE VACATED. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN.

COMMISIONER SUE KAPLAN, CLERK T.MARUYAMA, NOT REPORTED (218)
